descriptionHtml:
Dufour 525 GL for sale 2007| Guest Cabins:4|Crew Cabins:1

Engine Hours 460 Only!!

If you are looking for a comfortable and capable performance cruiser, this Dufour 525 GL for sale 2007 is a well‑presented option, currently lying in Sicily under the Italian flag. Designed by Umberto Felci, the 525 GL is known for balanced handling, generous interior volume and solid offshore capability. This particular example has had only two owners and has been maintained with care over the years, with many updates that contribute to her overall good condition.

(Autopilot,Radar,Battery Charger,Bow Thruster)
Specifications:

• Model: Dufour 525 GL
• Flag: Italian
• Year: 2007
• Designer: Umberto Felci
• LOA: 15.31 m
• Beam: 4.90 m
• Hull Length: 14.99 m
• Draft: 2.35 m
• Displacement: 16,200 kg
• Owners: 2
• Registration: Registered
• Safety Certificate Expiry: 17/03/2026
• Capacity: 12 people
• CE Category: A
• Location: Sicily

Deck and Exterior:
• Teak side decks and cockpit (to be revised)
• Cushions for seating and sunbathing
• Bulb keel (cast iron/lead)
• Sprayhood
• Bimini
• Teak cockpit table

Interior:
• 4 double cabins (forward cabins can be joined)
• 1 single crew cabin
• 2 saloon berths (telescopic table)
• 4 bathrooms
• Cherry‑style interior wood, white floorboards
• Cooker, oven, fridge and top‑loading freezer

Engine and Propulsion:
• Engine: Yanmar 4JH110CR
• Power: 110 hp
• Year: 2023
• Hours: 460 (as of Oct 2025)
• Tanks: 2 x 250 L
• Shaft drive
• Ewol 3‑blade feathering propeller
• Twin wheel steering
• Bow thruster

Electronics:
• Autopilot
• VHF
• Echo sounder (3D sensor)
• Log
• Raymarine 12” touch plotter
• Quantum radar
• Wind instrument
• Second pilot with actuator and compass
• Second GPS with chart display

Systems:
• Voltage: 12 V
• Batteries: 4 (3 service + 1 engine, 2025)
• Fresh water tanks: 3 (total 750 L PVC)
• Electric bilge pumps: 2
• Battery charger
• Boiler
• Pressure water system
• Black water system
• Deck shower

Rigging and Sails:
• Deck‑stepped mast
• Retractable bowsprit
• 4 winches (1 electric) – Harken
• Lazy bag
• Vang
• Hydraulic backstay
• Selden 404S furling system (2024)
• Mainsail full batten (2021) 60 m²
• Genoa
• Dyform standing rigging replaced 2022

Mooring and Safety:
• Tender 3.20 m (inflatable floor)
• Windlass
• Anchor
• 100 m chain
• Mooring lines
• Liferaft for 10 people (valid until 2026)
• Fenders: 6

Overall, this Dufour 525 GL for sale 2007 presents a sound combination of comfort, sailing performance and recent upgrades. She is available for viewing in Sicily. Contact us!!
